are these for alert 2 clears? wow ive never played any of these teams but im having a hard time imagining most if not all of them.
if you dont mind id love to hear your theories o/
- what does faros add to the first team?

- is tawil the dps for the 2nd team? thats a bit odd ive only ran her as sub dps for setup turns and utility (possee, the rouse card, double cast on ult cards.. or banking them on ultra teams...etc).

- who builds str for jenkin? does it strive off of just cassiah rouse temp str?
after a big pickman round with a lot of stolen str who deals damage? salv gains str, pickman empowers exalts and utility, caecus adds more str.... sanga could exalt for damage but she scales off shield not str.

- wouldnt goli and helot fight over who deals damage in the same comp? i think aigis and caro chorus with goli or celeste and aequor warden/chorus would be better, but then again i heavily try to stick to realm purity or pairing with chaos to run full realm mechanics unless someone really, really benefits from ultra's extra turn card holding :o

nope, and his optimizations are all entirely stated in the most biased and unsubjective way there is,
there is probably a lot of facts scattered around the videos but unless you want someone telling you exactly how to play. i cant see how he should be recommended to newer players, or players in general.

arcs do conclude portions of the story, but as a live service game im sure newer events will continue to unfold.

but from my experience every chapter or two feel like a nice story on their own so nothing  abruptly finishes or excessively drags on
also it took me seeing them right next to eachother to realize how akin they are to one another
we got rem and ram at home

For a1, a2 or even a3 adding blue/caro helps a lot with the shield/heal. For faros she can help to draw pollux card, I'm not really familiar with him but afaik he wants to play a card over and over. 
Tawil is very often played as DPS. 
For Jenkins I think of it more as castor team, though he's e0 I still think it's enough for a2. If need strength you could run ogier, I think he's indeed more suitable for the team, was planning to save him for another wave but ended up forgot about him.
Helot and Goliath both have some synergy with strikes so I put them together. Besides dealing dmg, Goliath can boost strength, helot can boost strike, so it's not like they are competing but I think they can compliment each other.
I used to do mostly pure realm too but recent changes all encourage realm mixing. For example you can generate more tentacles by staying in blue stance, reduces the penalty of realm mixing in ultra from 40 to 25 (not too sure about the number), and caro can have furnace every turn in mixed realm

ohh neat, thanks for the insight!
yeah pollux wants to play sacred heart but i think insights from anything can help with that, even just using the annihilation from ultra's mechanic.

I've been playing Tawil, Caecus, Myriam and Ramona and I'm not liking Myriam because I feel her lowering my draws is a big drawback but I also like the Aliemus she hands Tawil for free.. is there any alternative I can put in to do the same or a similar job without making me draw like 2 cards every turn? Or am I playing Myriam wrong? Really confused about this team so far
Gdoll is an aliemus battery in the right colors, but ummm
Are you holding onto obsessions? You shouldn’t be doing that. Just play them instantly.
Oh! Okay, so just throw em out into the trash bin?
I was under the impression I should hold them
They have 2 modes. Sacrament and obsessions. The former is fine to hold onto for whatever reason. The latter you play instantly in 99% of cases.
I can assure you the 1% is not going to come up
Okay! Good to know that I don't have to gut my draws for battery then
Thank you lots!

pandia is one of the only character (if not the only) that definitely gets powered down as you advance into more challenging content, otherwise caecus is worth investing into, i would suggest into ultra as well as there is more enemy str reduction/counter/counter-scaling units there, sanga seems nice too but ive only read her abilities so far, and just a friendly reminder that with the pulls you have saved (or even without) you wouldnt really get "stuck" at any points, you'll feel the game get more difficult and it'll help you realize what your team might need more of o/

Hi everyone i am new player just got new character Tamil and from free pull Nautila is that good i have some standard pulls should i use them for characters or WoD?

well she has a great series of cards, the str build card shuffles wings, wing cards shuffle higher tier winged cards with different properties which cycling between aliemus, str reduction, then skill-pick activation. which is already pretty great (also one of the very, very few reliable access to barrier buff in the game).
but on top of that, her shifting card turns into copies of other characters cards and give her more aliemus, and her ult lets you pick 3 from 5 cards from any other character in the realm(s) youre currently playing, including characters you dont have.
a 1 cost rouse that guarantees a picked posse to be activated twice as well as keyflare generation per card/on exalt
I'm so confused 😭
about what : o
yeah tamil and nutella are pretty good, characters should take priority and dont be aftaid to spend pulls, youll get plenty more especially standard banner pulls.
My current characters are all from Chaos
WoDs are nice too but theyre mostly there to squeeze more performance from characters or teams
2 ssr and 4 sr
thats pretty nice, mixing realms is nice too
there are only 4 srs in the game so basically every chaacter is their own powerhouse (which is amazing)
also u could use a player invitation in ur first 3 days playing and get some progression rewards c:
Should I try pulling from another realm
In early game
yeah, scroll throw the standard banner characters and see who looks cool to you
100%, there are no filler characters so all of them are worth having
Ultra characters looks cool but I saw they need heavily to be invested
just remember to not spend the premium currency on standard banner
Who is good with Tamil and Nautila
not necessarily, and theyve been balanced better over time since the game launched
Should I use Ramona
its tawil btw heh, u could try that yeah, dont worry too much about it its too early to tell what u might like better if that makes sense
a simple metric to try and follow is to make teams with at least one assault, one warden and one chorus
Ok

u can also do a character's trial before pulling for them to see how they feel, but that might get more confusing if ure too new so give urself some time and play theough some levels with tawil and ramona, maybe with doll and ogier

especially since they are generally a 1:1 ratio in pulls (same pity, same drop rate)
but having like, Tawil E3 is muuuuch better than her WoD T3 on a E0 Tawil for example
and that is true for all characters as far as im aware
Well I got lucky and on first pull got Tawil should i try to get her T3 i think banner is still on for 26 days i think

i wouldnt suggest saving for too much or anything, but if u play a bit more before pulling with the premium currency u might have a better feeling for who u want to spend on, but dont worry about it either way, you get a lot of currency overall
i do think getting her E2 (two more copies) and her weapon (WoD) if u like her would give u a very strong reliable chaacter yeah

personally I prepare to get my ass kicked. Even when I installed the game, the amount of information was overwhelming, the questions kept and keep rising and now I tried out Tawil in trials today...she has so many cards and utility, I'm lost 😭
and considering that the game has so many mechanics and tactics, I can't imagine how hard the late content will be XD
that's what makes the game insanely interesting to me though, I've completed and tried out so many games that I lost interest in gaming. Morimens is a nice hidden gem...
haha just like the simulations
it is a difficult game but in all honesty the balancing is pretty nice, and it has gotten even better over time so you could get pretty creative with how u want to play the runs
and the game would still let you, so looking up too much info about the solutions to problems you havent faced yet might only end up overwhelming you or taking part of the fun out

i do understand tho a lot of other gacha games are too restricting with currency and content so if u just do what u want u might get walled out or end up "bricking" ur account for a while, which is luckily not the case here c:

Tawil is not so bad once you kind of get into the flow of how she works. It seems complicated to begin with when she copies cards, uses other characters cards that aren't even in the group, and her cards make other cards that make other cards etc but at least for me it just suddenly clicked and makes sense after I used her a bit.
